items.briefing:
A cyber attack on Mackay Sugar has highlighted risks to Australia's food supply chain, serving as a reminder that critical industries remain attractive targets. Separately, a new Clayton Utz report is urging Australian boards to take third-party supplier risk and AI rollout gaps more seriously — areas where many organisations remain exposed.

From 1 July, some text messages will look different due to new sender ID changes, so staff should stay alert to unexpected messages claiming to be from known organisations. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unfamiliar-looking text from a known sender after 1 July, verify through an official website or phone number before clicking any links.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure attack on Australia's second-largest sugar exporter signals systemic food supply chain vulnerability.
